string.description: Text value for display content, variable values, and filter arguments

number.description: Numeric value for arithmetic, iteration counts, and comparisons

boolean.description: Boolean value for conditional expressions in if/elseif blocks

null.description: Represents an undefined or empty value, falsy in boolean context

array.description: Ordered sequence of values iterable with for loops

hash.description: Key-value mapping used for structured data and named template arguments
